note: Consolidated key results for all 20 experiments. Companion to voynich_gradient_note_v11.md. Regenerate raw numbers via the scripts; this file is for one-step diffing of a replication.

method.metric: h2 = H(adjacent bigram) - H(unigram), bits; space is a symbol
method.search: greedy: top-90 within-word adjacent pairs per step, apply argmax-h2 merge
method.transfer_recovery: (Y h2 gain under X ops) / (Y h2 gain under own ops); structural depth k=17

exp1_language_vs_control.verdict: entropy repair reaches language levels but control passes more easily; no evidence of meaning; homophony forced (K 45-52 vs alphabet ~25); words ~2.6 units vs 5-6 letters

exp2_currierAB._note: recovery_* are fractions; recovery_pct_* are the same rounded to percent; the 77-80% headline is the range across k=17/k=40 and both directions

exp4_topic_dialect_factorial.verdict: dialect survives topic control (79.7%); B is a family not a machine; chain HA-HB-SB-BB emerges

exp8_scribe_vs_regime.verdict: regime not penmanship, ~23:1 in unique variance; gradient orthogonal to Currier A/B axis

exp9_timm_model.verdict: monotony growth is a Currier-B continuum; drift between sections not along binding; drift-with-forgetting (pure-additive rejected)

exp11_generative_model.model: P_theta = (1-t)P_A + t P_B, char bigram incl space
exp11_generative_model.verdict: one knob reproduces the gradient interior to +/-0.08 bits; pole extremity is a word-repetition/memory effect beyond bigrams

confirmed: exp13 null-passes; exp14 not-baked-in; exp15 word-order-irrelevant
falsified_informatively: exp13 gradient-is-diagnostic (it is not — reproducible by meaningful+meaningless)
exp19 labels-featureless (partly revised: n-gram templates DO separate, but register-like)
exp20 calibrated-self-copying-reaches-pole (fails: reaches neighborhood but not the coherent pole vocabulary; pole needs template grammar)

open_items: template-aware (slot-grammar) self-copying generator (Exp 20 showed the pole needs word-template structure that local-mutation self-copying cannot produce)
isolate referent from register in labels (within-dialect within-register contrast; needs more label data)
OFF-PLATFORM (only remaining routes toward meaning): multispectral imaging, botanical/art-historical iconography, codicological gathering-order reconstruction

exp12_labels.H1_verdict: falsified: labels are a distinct register, pulled toward the A/o-attachment pole
exp12_labels.H2_verdict: significant between-section label structure (> paragraphs) but along the register axis, not evidently referent-semantic
exp12_labels.marquee_verdict: null: star-labels and plant-labels near-identical; labels do not behave like referent-names
exp12_labels.interpretation: the best crib candidate does not behave like naming; points mildly away from readability; not a proof of meaninglessness

exp13_synthetic_controls.pipeline: 12 units x 2000 words, pairwise k=17 recovery, MDS axis-1 %, min pairwise similarity
exp13_synthetic_controls.verdict: pipeline does not manufacture gradients (null 42%/98.5%); but a 1-axis gradient is reproduced by both meaningful and meaningless structured processes; only the section-mixture matches the low entropy; the gradient constrains interpretation without deciding it

exp14_leave_one_section_out.verdict: nothing baked in; Pharma stays mid-gradient out-of-sample; Bio pole robust

exp15_shuffle_nulls.verdict: word order contributes nothing; ~74/88 axis points are glyph-frequency + word-length, ~14 genuine within-word sequence

exp16_self_copying_generator.mechanism: whole-word copying from recent text; mutations within attested similarity classes; drift theta; verbatim-copy prob 0.10->0.35
exp16_self_copying_generator.verdict: structured self-copying reproduces low entropy + one-axis gradient (the answer Exp 13 lacked); overshoots repetition and does not traverse the real axis -> phenomenology, not this manuscript

exp17_beam_search.verdict: A/B gap stable and far from 100% under beam search -> not a greedy artifact

exp18_cross_transcriber.verdict: A/B gap holds on 2 independent transcribers -> not a transcription artifact

exp19_label_ngram.verdict: richer templates separate star/plant (TV 0.25-0.33 vs 0.154) and within-dialect (p=0.0005), but the pattern is the e-vs-o register axis, not evident naming -> Exp 12 partly revised, interpretation reopened not resolved

exp20_calibrated_generator.verdict: calibration FAILS informatively: directed local self-copying reaches the pole's statistical neighborhood (coord +0.76, low entropy) but generates malformed pseudo-words, not Bio-B's coherent vocabulary, and stalls short of +1.03; the pole requires coherent word-template (slot-grammar) structure beyond directed local self-copying

program_status: Computational text-only program complete at 20 experiments. Central result: a reproducible structural metric finds a one-dimensional register gradient (real, robust to beam search and transcriber, largely first-order); generators and labels constrain but do not solve interpretation; the Biological pole carries word-template structure that self-copying-with-drift does not manufacture.
